title: Tooth FALLS into Eva's palm
prompt: @Eva and @Sara at the bathroom mirror. @Eva's mouth OPENS wide. A tiny WHITE TOOTH POPS out and DROPS into a small cupped palm at chest level. Both girls' eyes WIDEN. @Sara's mouth GASPS, hands FLY UP to cheeks. The other hand HOVERS over the tooth protectively. Warm bathroom daylight. @Eva (delighted gasp): "It POPPED out!" @Sara (excited): "EVA!"
